scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.clean: npm --prefix frontend run clean && npm --prefix backend run clean
scripts.clean:all: node -e "const {rmSync} = require('fs'); ['frontend/node_modules','backend/node_modules','node_modules'].forEach(d => { try { rmSync(d, {recursive:true, force:true}); console.log('removed', d) } catch(e){} });"
